title: Reasons to Retain West Pharmaceutical (WST) Stock for Now
text: West Pharmaceutical's (WST) strength in its proprietary products segment raises optimism about the stock.

title: West Pharmaceutical (WST) Hits 52-Week High: More Room to Grow?
text: West Pharmaceutical (WST) continues to gain momentum due to its strength in the Proprietary Products business. However, forex concerns persist.

title: West Pharmaceutical: Revise To Buy On Exceptional Economic Characteristics
text: West Pharmaceutical Services has seen a 60% rally in its stock price since December 2022, outperforming the S&P 500. Momentum in financials shows a decline in top line sales but strong growth in contract-manufactured revenues and free cash flow. The company has demonstrated the ability to compound value for shareholders and has attractive technical indicators for future growth.

title: Is West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (WST) Fairly Valued?
text: The stock of West Pharmaceutical Services Inc ( WST , Financial) has seen a daily gain of 4.13% and a 3-month gain of 6.84%. With an Earnings Per Share (EPS) of 6.86, the question arises: Is the stock fairly valued?

title: West to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
text: EXTON, Pa. , Aug. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, today announced that it will present at the UBS MedTech, Tools and Genomics Summit in Dana Point, CA on Wednesday, August 16, 2023 at 3:00 – 3:45 PM PDT. A live audio webcast will be available in the "Investors" section of the Company's website at www.westpharma.com.
